creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text: The example @ https://www.exploit-db.com/exploits/37710/ show there are some unique configurations (and dangerous on the part of the system administrator) that lead to this.  From the looks of things in https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=1277426, the fix in 1.8.15 is incomplete and there were some additional commits added upstream for the next release.  The 1.8.15 test does at least address the example in exploitdb but it's probably worth looking a little bit closer.
